---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Pulse
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the frustration or limitation.

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
